Name: Game Killer
Effect: All treasure chests always contain at least 3 rewards. Arcana Chests contain 2 additional chest rewards.

Name: Gemini
Effect: Spawns a clone that mirrors your movement and attacks.

Name: Twilight Requiem
Effect: Killed enemies explode dealing area damage.

Name: Tragic Princess
Effect: Attacks may poison enemies.

Name: Awake
Effect: Increases damage based on current health.

Name: Chaos in the Dark Night
Effect: Increases damage for each enemy on screen (caps at +300%).

Name: Sarabande of Healing
Effect: Small HP regeneration per second.

Name: Iron Blue Will
Effect: Immunity to freeze and curse.

Name: Mad Groove
Effect: All items on the ground are attracted to you.
Unlock Method: Reach minute 31 in any stage (or type code)

Name: Divine Bloodline
Effect: Chest spawns doubled, better drops.

Name: Beginning
Effect: Level up effect doubled.

Name: Waltz of Pearls
Effect: Increases gold pickup radius and magnet effect.

Name: Out of Bounds
Effect: Enemy spawn rate increased, more XP gems.
Unlock Method: Reach minute 31 in any stage (or type code)

Name: Wicked Season
Effect: Damage increases as time passes.

Name: Jail of Crystal
Effect: Chance to freeze enemies on hit.

Name: Disco of Gold
Effect: Enemies drop more gold.
Unlock Method: Reach minute 31 in any stage (or type code)

Name: Slash
Effect: Chance for critical hit based on speed.

Name: Lost and Found Painting
Effect: Revive once per run with 50% HP.

Name: Boogaloo of Illusions
Effect: Projectiles may split and bounce.

Name: Heart of Fire
Effect: Fire damage over time to nearby enemies.

Name: Silent Old Sanctuary
Effect: Weapons gain bonus effects at max level.
Unlock Method: Reach minute 31 in any stage (or type code)

Name: Blood Astronomia
Effect: Killing enemies may reduce cooldowns.

Name: Stake to your Heart
Effect: Same as Game Killer (0) but stronger effect.

Name: Sapphire Mist
Effect: Same as Gemini (I) but clone attacks too.

Name: Hidden Anathema
Effect: Same as Tragic Princess (III) but poison spreads.

Name: Pale Diamond Incursion
Effect: Same as Chaos in the Dark Night (V) but better scaling.

Name: Moonlight Bolero
Effect: Same as Sarabande of Healing (VI) but stronger.

Name: Edge of the Earth
Effect: Same as Mad Groove (VIII) but items move faster.

Name: Hail from the Future
Effect: Same as Beginning (X) but also extra XP.

Name: Crystal Cries
Effect: Same as Out of Bounds (XII) but also more luck.

Name: Call of a Mad Moon
Effect: Same as Wicked Season (XIII) but starts stronger.

Name: Victorian Horror
Effect: Same as Boogaloo of Illusions (XVIII) but more bounces.

Name: Heir of Fate
Effect: Same as Heart of Fire (XIX) but also damage shield.

Name: Wandering the Jet Black
Effect: Same as Blood Astronomia (XXI) but better proc rate.
